title: Tooltip Scroll
description: The premier Fabric mod that allows you to move/scroll tooltips.
body: # Tooltip Scroll [![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/Provismet/Tooltip-Scroll-Fabric/blob/1.20/LICENSE) ![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat-square) ![Image](https://img.shields.io/badge/mod%20loader-fabric/quilt-d64541?style=flat-square) ## Description Tooltips are now scrollable. With highly-customisable keybinds and settings, you can move tooltips anywhere on or off the screen. ### Movement Using the mouse-wheel, keybinds, or even WASD, tooltips can be moved across the screen. ### Smoothness Setting a smoothness value lower than 1 will create a gliding visual effect. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wySVd6d8/images/d9c3744ff8f902b19858af87240ef21c37a4a986.gif) ## Extras To adjust the settings modmenu and cloth config are required. Alternatively any setting can be adjusted in the `config/tooltipscroll.json` file in your Minecraft profile.
